title: Pritunl
description: Enterprise distributed OpenVPN and WireGuard VPN server with a web admin console for managing users, organizations and networks.
installation: No official Pritunl VPN container exists; this template uses the actively maintained community image ghcr.io/jippi/docker-pritunl. Pritunl stores all state in MongoDB, provided here by the documentdb add-on (rotate the mongoadmin password). The app connects via PRITUNL_MONGODB_URI. After first boot, exec into the pod and run 'pritunl default-password' to get the temporary admin login, then open the web console at {{KUBERO_APP_URL}} to set the admin URL and finish setup. IMPORTANT VPN caveat: actual VPN tunneling needs the tun device plus NET_ADMIN/privileged and host networking, which a standard Kubero deployment does not grant; the web admin console and user/org management work out of the box, but to terminate live OpenVPN/WireGuard tunnels you must add privileged securityContext and a hostPath /dev/net/tun mount.
